title: Add co-founder contact number to About Us page

requirements.text: In the About Us page (frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx), display +91 9156896495 as Shushant Waghmare's (co-founder) personal contact number. This number should appear in his bio/profile card as a clickable tel: link, styled consistently with Gaurav Saswade's contact number display.

quotes: Add this phone number for co-founder: (+91 9156896495)

acceptanceCriteria: The number +91 9156896495 is visible in Shushant Waghmare's bio/profile card on the About Us page.
The number is rendered as a clickable <a href="tel:+919156896495"> link.
The styling matches the existing contact number display used for Gaurav Saswade's number on the same page.
No other pages or components are modified.

constraints: Do not alter any other contact number already present on the page.
nonGoals: Adding the co-founder number to the Footer, Contact Us page, or any other page.
